description.short: A Teams-ready enterprise knowledge assistant with governed workflow prompts.
description.full: RepAI is built by Jeremiah Adetoro for the Microsoft 365 Enterprise Agents hackathon. It installs one app for the reliable demo path: an enterprise knowledge assistant and Staff Support workflow that answers from approved context, recommends next-step prompts, refuses risky commitments, and keeps an audit trail. The package also includes a Teams call prototype surface for the future live meeting experience.

commands.title: Use demo connection
commands.description: Load RepAI's synthetic hackathon work context.

commands.title: Start Teams call
commands.description: Ask RepAI to join the configured Teams meeting as Jeremiah's disclosed delegate.
